mapper.insert: insert into lego_tools (id, tool_type, tool_category, name, display_label, description, definition, created_at) values (#{id}, #{toolType}, #{toolCategory}, #{name}, #{displayLabel}, #{description}, cast(#{definitionJson} as jsonb), now())
mapper.update: update lego_tools set tool_type = #{toolType}, tool_category = #{toolCategory}, name = #{name}, display_label = #{displayLabel}, description = #{description}, definition = cast(#{definitionJson} as jsonb) where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select count(*)::int from lego_tools where lower(trim(name)) = lower(trim(#{name}))
and id != #{excludeId}
select id, tool_type, tool_category, name, display_label, description, cast(definition as text) as definition_json, created_at from lego_tools where id = #{id}
select id, tool_type, tool_category, name, display_label, description, cast(definition as text) as definition_json, created_at from lego_tools order by created_at desc

where.if: and ( name ilike concat('%', #{q}, '%') or id ilike concat('%', #{q}, '%') or tool_type ilike concat('%', #{q}, '%') or coalesce(display_label, '') ilike concat('%', #{q}, '%') or coalesce(description, '') ilike concat('%', #{q}, '%') or cast(definition as text) ilike concat('%', #{q}, '%') )

mapper.select:
select id, tool_type, tool_category, name, display_label, description, cast(definition as text) as definition_json, created_at from lego_tools
order by created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
